productDisplayName: Spinn Men Cubic Black Sports Shoes
description: Style Note Created for today's generation, this spinn Cubic shoe embodies the brand's motto - combining technology and high-octane fashion. We think these are just right, both for Sports and for braving the urban jungle, thanks to their nonchalantly sturdy aesthetic. An all-weather staple, the style perfectly suits the cosmopolitan vibe you love! Product Details Synthetic and felt upper with mesh inlays has central lacing Low at the ankle and high at the collar the shoe is well padded inside Curved plastic midsole with foamy rubber supports upraised at the heel Two piece TPU outsole with patterned grooves Material and Care Synthetic Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight Remove dust with a dry clean cloth
